title: GravThermal-SIDM
shortDescription: A GPU-accelerated N-body code to simulate the gravothermal evolution of self-interacting dark matter halos, enabling parameter-space sweeps on supercomputers.

title: PBH-Constraints
shortDescription: A unified Bayesian framework combining HSC microlensing, EROS-2, and 21-cm global-signal data to constrain the PBH dark matter fraction across the full mass range.

title: DarkStar-3D
shortDescription: Three-dimensional radiation-hydrodynamics simulations of Population III protostellar clouds with dark matter annihilation heating, built on top of the FLASH AMR framework.

title: CMB-Net
shortDescription: A convolutional neural network pipeline for fast parameter inference from CMB temperature and polarization maps, trained on CLASS-generated power spectra.

title: WIMP-Direct
shortDescription: Analytical and numerical toolkit for computing WIMP direct detection rates including nuclear form factors, annual modulation, and detector response functions.
